verses.1: How has the Lord covered the daughter of Zion with a cloud in his anger!
verses.2: The Lord has swallowed up all the dwellings of Jacob
verses.3: He has cut off all the horn of Israel in fierce anger.
verses.4: He has bent his bow like an enemy.
verses.5: The Lord has become as an enemy.
verses.6: He has violently taken away his tabernacle,
verses.7: The Lord has cast off his altar.
verses.8: The LORD has purposed to destroy the wall of the daughter of Zion.
verses.9: Her gates have sunk into the ground.
verses.10: The elders of the daughter of Zion sit on the ground.
verses.13: What shall I testify to you?
verses.14: Your prophets have seen false and foolish visions for you.
verses.15: All that pass by clap their hands at you.
verses.16: All your enemies have opened their mouth wide against you.
verses.17: The LORD has done that which he planned.
verses.18: Their heart cried to the Lord.
verses.19: Arise, cry out in the night,
verses.20: “Look, LORD, and see to whom you have done thus!
verses.21: “The youth and the old man lie on the ground in the streets.
verses.22: “You have called, as in the day of a solemn assembly, my terrors on every side.
